glosses.sv: dyka upp; komma upp till ytan
glosses.ro: a apărea; a ieși la suprafață
glosses.da: dukke op; komme op til overfladen

translations.en: I'm barely waking up this morning.
translations.de: Ich wache heute Morgen kaum auf.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今天早上才刚醒过来。
translations.vi: Sáng nay tôi vừa mới thức dậy.
translations.hi: आज सुबह मैं मुश्किल से जाग रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Σήμερα το πρωί με το ζόρι ξυπνάω.
translations.nb: I dag tidlig våkner jeg knapt.
translations.id: Pagi ini aku baru saja terbangun.
translations.sv: Jag är knappt vaken denna morgon.
translations.ro: Abia mă trezesc în această dimineață.
translations.da: Jeg vågner knap her til morgen.
translations.ja: 今朝はやっと目が覚めてきた。

tokens.explanation: Cliticized subject pronoun elided before a vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; agrees with the subject “J’”.
Preposition forming the fixed adverbial expression “à peine”.
Second part of the idiomatic adverbial phrase “à peine” meaning “barely”.
Demonstrative determiner modifying “matin”; masculine singular.
Noun head of the NP “ce matin”; temporal adjunct specifying when.

sentences.target: Sa tête émerge de la foule.

translations.fr: Sa tête émerge de la foule.
translations.en: Their head pops up from the crowd.
translations.es: Su cabeza asoma entre la multitud.
translations.de: Ein Kopf ragt aus der Menge hervor.
translations.it: La sua testa spunta dalla folla.
translations.ko: 한 사람의 머리가 군중 위로 불쑥 올라온다.
translations.zh-Hans: 有人在人群中探出头来。
translations.yue: 有人喺人群入面探出個頭嚟。
translations.pt: Uma cabeça surge por cima da multidão.
translations.vi: Một cái đầu bất chợt nhô lên khỏi đám đông.
translations.nl: Een hoofd duikt op uit de menigte.
translations.hi: भीड़ में से एक सिर अचानक ऊपर दिखता है.
translations.pl: Z tłumu nagle wyłania się jakaś głowa.
translations.el: Ένα κεφάλι ξεπροβάλλει μέσα από το πλήθος.
translations.nb: Et hode dukker opp fra mengden.
translations.sv: Ett huvud sticker upp ur folkmassan.
translations.cs: Z davu se vynoří jedna hlava.
translations.da: Et hoved dukker op fra mængden.
translations.ja: 人混みから頭がひょっこり出てくる。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; 3rd person singular possessor; agrees feminine singular with “tête”.
Noun serving as subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with “tête”.
Preposition introducing a source complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing “foule”.
Noun complement to the preposition “de”; denotes the source.

sentences.target: On le voit émerger de l'eau.

translations.fr: On le voit émerger de l'eau.
translations.en: We see him coming up from the water.
translations.de: Wir sehen ihn aus dem Wasser auftauchen.
translations.ko: 우리는 그가 물에서 올라오는 것을 본다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们看见他从水里冒出来。
translations.yue: 我哋見到佢喺水入面浮上嚟。
translations.ru: Мы видим, как он выходит из воды.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi thấy anh ấy trồi lên từ dưới nước.
translations.nl: We zien hem opduiken uit het water.
translations.uk: Ми бачимо, як він виходить з води.
translations.hi: हम उसे पानी से ऊपर आते हुए देखते हैं.
translations.pl: Widzimy, jak wynurza się z wody.
translations.el: Τον βλέπουμε να αναδύεται από το νερό.
translations.nb: Vi ser ham komme opp av vannet.
translations.id: Kami melihat dia muncul dari air.
translations.sv: Vi ser honom komma upp ur vattnet.
translations.cs: Vidíme ho, jak vychází z vody.
translations.da: Vi ser ham komme op af vandet.
translations.ja: 彼が水から出てくるのが見える。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; 3rd person singular form used generically.
Clitic direct object pronoun, masculine singular; object of “voit”.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes an infinitive complement.
Infinitive verb complement of the perception verb “voit”; subject is the clitic “le”.
Preposition marking the source of emergence.
Elided definite article before vowel; feminine singular here, introducing “eau”.
Noun complement to “de l’”; object of the preposition indicating the medium.

sentences.target: De nouvelles idées émergent pendant la réunion.
sentences.reading: /də nu.vɛl zi.de e.mɛʁʒ pɑ̃.dɑ̃ la ʁe.y.njɔ̃/

translations.fr: De nouvelles idées émergent pendant la réunion.
translations.ipa: /də nu.vɛl zi.de e.mɛʁʒ pɑ̃.dɑ̃ la ʁe.y.njɔ̃/
translations.en: New ideas are emerging during the meeting.
translations.es: Surgen nuevas ideas durante la reunión.
translations.de: Neue Ideen entstehen während der Besprechung.
translations.it: Nuove idee emergono durante la riunione.
translations.ko: 회의 중에 새로운 아이디어가 떠오르고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 在会议期间涌现出新的想法。
translations.yue: 開會期間有新點子湧現。
translations.ru: Во время собрания появляются новые идеи.
translations.pt: Novas ideias surgem durante a reunião.
translations.tr: Toplantı sırasında yeni fikirler ortaya çıkıyor.
translations.vi: Trong cuộc họp, những ý tưởng mới đang xuất hiện.
translations.nl: Tijdens de vergadering komen er nye ideeën op.
translations.uk: Під час зустрічі з'являються нові ідеї.
translations.hu: Új ötletek születnek a megbeszélés közben.
translations.hi: बैठक के दौरान नए विचार उभर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: W trakcie spotkania pojawiają się nowe pomysły.
translations.el: Κατά τη διάρκεια της συνάντησης αναδύονται νέες ιδέες.
translations.nb: Under møtet dukker det opp nye ideer.
translations.ro: În timpul ședinței apar idei noi.
translations.cs: Během schůzky se objevují nové nápady.
translations.da: Under mødet opstår der nye idéer.
translations.ja: 会議中に新しいアイデアが生まれている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite plural article (variant of “des” before an adjective) introducing the NP.
Adjective, feminine plural, modifying “idées”.
Plural noun serving as the subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with “idées”.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, introducing “réunion”.
Noun complement to “pendant”; denotes the time context.
